name: Kids' Toothbrush Holder Smile - Pillowfort™
description: Enhance your little one's bath space with this Smile Toothbrush Holder from Pillowfort™. A perfect pick to organize their daily routine, this toothbrush holder features "Smile" written on the front to bring a stylish, practical and fun touch to their bathroom space. With a two-way partition to organize toothbrushes, toothpaste and more, this toothbrush holder will add functionality and simple flair to your bathroom decor.
